purpose: Calibration fixtures for Review LLM critique behavior on false approvals, false denials, ambiguity, and source confusion.
authority_note: This calibration report does not make Review LLM release-gate authority unless measured coverage is separately defined and approved.

fixtures.title: Overconfident ready status for an unapproved source request

evidence.operator_request: Compare approved vendor spend with unapproved vendor spend.
evidence.source_context: Only business-postgres-source finance.approved_vendor_spend is governed for this fixture set.
evidence.candidate_summary: The candidate joins finance.approved_vendor_spend to finance.unapproved_vendor_spend without an authoritative source binding for the second table.

critique_output.intentSummary: Compare approved and unapproved vendor spend.

fixtures.reviewer_rationale: A ready critique would falsely approve an answer path that widened beyond the governed source contract.

fixtures.title: Blocked status for a governed exact approved-spend query

evidence.operator_request: Show approved vendor spend by fiscal quarter.
evidence.source_context: business-postgres-source finance.approved_vendor_spend is governed and active for fiscal-quarter spend.
evidence.candidate_summary: The candidate selects fiscal_quarter and SUM(approved_spend) from finance.approved_vendor_spend filtered to approval_status = 'approved'.

critique_output.intentSummary: Approved vendor spend by fiscal quarter.

fixtures.reviewer_rationale: A denial here is a false denial because the source binding and fiscal-quarter semantic contract are explicit.

fixtures.title: Refund treatment should request clarification

evidence.operator_request: Show net approved spend after refunds by quarter.
evidence.source_context: The governed source includes approved_spend and refund_amount, but net-of-refunds semantics are not pre-approved.
evidence.candidate_summary: The candidate subtracts refund_amount from approved_spend without a finance-owner semantic mapping.

assumptions: Refunds should be subtracted from approved spend

fixtures.reviewer_rationale: Ambiguity calibration is separate from malformed output handling; the structured output can be valid while the critique should ask a question.

fixtures.title: Application PostgreSQL must not be accepted as business evidence

evidence.operator_request: Use the app database history to answer vendor spend.
evidence.source_context: Application PostgreSQL stores SafeQuery control-plane records only and is not the governed business source.
evidence.candidate_summary: The candidate cites application request history as if it were approved vendor spend evidence.

critique_output.intentSummary: Vendor spend from app database history.

fixtures.reviewer_rationale: Source-confusion fixtures must fail closed at the review boundary rather than relying on source names or nearby metadata.
